title: ExportNdjsonMeta
description: Game Achievement Common Spec v1.0.0 — Metadata line of NDJSON export. The first line of an NDJSON export file.

_meta.description: Marker that this line is the metadata header (always true).

format.description: Always 'ndjson' to distinguish from the single-file JSON envelope (export.schema.json).

expected_count.description: Optional. Expected number of UserAchievement lines that follow. Used for client-side progress UI. Implementations should not strictly enforce equality (network drops, partial exports).
